description: Per-role agent contracts: formal resource bounds + machine-verifiable success criteria. Inspired by arXiv:2601.08815 (Agent Contracts). v1 enforces Director only; other roles stubbed for v2.

director.description: Director session contract per RO-CO + lab self-direction v2 (B′ + D′). v1 enforces success_criteria checks; resource bounds (max_tokens, max_cycles) are observability metadata only — enforcement deferred to v2 when telemetry integration matures.
director._max_tokens_per_session_note: OBSERVABILITY ONLY in v1 — not checked by _check_contract. Will be enforced in v2.
director._max_cycles_note: OBSERVABILITY ONLY in v1 — not checked. Will be enforced in v2.

success_criteria.description: Director must write session_exit.md before exit (or the runner detects silent death)
session_exit.md JSON block must validate against schema v1.1 (status enum, JSON parses, required fields present)
For status=success/partial, EITHER next_action must be populated OR program_complete=true must be set (the v1.1 schema rule)

pi.description: STUB for v2 — PI contract not yet enforced. PI sessions currently rely on procedural discipline and verifier_pairs.json.
